name: Tiernan Gold Corp.
description: Tiernan Gold Corp. is a Vancouver-based gold developer advancing the 100%-owned Volcan Gold Project on Chile's Maricunga Gold Belt in the Atacama Region, a prolific porphyry gold district hosting over 100 million ounces of historic and current gold resources. The Volcan project encompasses four mining concessions of 5,400 hectares plus surrounding exploration concessions of 53,000 hectares. Tiernan Gold is a wholly-owned indirect subsidiary of Hochschild Mining PLC and completed its TSXV listing via reverse takeover in 2023, with the project at the advanced exploration and resource development stage.
